Package recoder.java

Class JavaNonTerminalProgramElement

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, ModelElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
AnnotationElementValuePair, AnnotationPropertyReference, AnnotationUseSpecification, ArrayInitializer, ArrayLengthReference, ArrayReference, Branch, CcatchNonstandardParameterDeclaration, CompilationUnit, ElementValueArrayInitializer, EnumConstructorReference, ExecutionContext, Import, InheritanceSpecification, JavaDeclaration, JavaStatement, MetaClassReference, MethodReference, MethodSignature, Operator, PackageReference, PackageSpecification, SpecialConstructorReference, SuperReference, ThisReference, Throws, TypeArgumentDeclaration, TypeReference, UncollatedReferenceQualifier, VariableReference, VariableSpecification
public abstract class JavaNonTerminalProgramElement extends JavaProgramElement implements NonTerminalProgramElement
Top level implementation of a Java NonTerminalProgramElement.

    • makeAllParentRolesValid

      public void makeAllParentRolesValid()
      Defaults to attempt a depth-first traversal using a TreeWalker.
      Specified by:
      makeAllParentRolesValid in interface NonTerminalProgramElement

    • getIndexOfChild

      @Deprecated public int getIndexOfChild(int positionCode)
      Deprecated.
      Extracts the index of a child from its position code.

      This method does not return the child index as received by getIndexOfChild(), but rather the index within internal data structure representation.

      Therefore it is common that getIndexOfChild(getChildPositionCode(aChild)) != getIndexOfChild(aChild)

      This method is deprecated as of 0.75

      Specified by:
      getIndexOfChild in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
      Parameters:
      positionCode - the position code.
      Returns:
      the index of the given position code.
      See Also:
      • NonTerminalProgramElement.getChildPositionCode(ProgramElement)

    • getRoleOfChild

      public int getRoleOfChild(int positionCode)
      Extracts the role of a child from its position code.
      Specified by:
      getRoleOfChild in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
      Parameters:
      positionCode - the position code.
      Returns:
      the role code of the given position code.
      See Also:
      • NonTerminalProgramElement.getChildPositionCode(ProgramElement)

    • getIndexOfChild

      public int getIndexOfChild(ProgramElement child)
      Returns the index of the given child, or -1 if there is no such child. The child is searched for by identity: getChildAt(getIndexOfChild(x)) == x.
      Specified by:
      getIndexOfChild in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
      Parameters:
      child - the exact child to look for.
      Returns:
      the index of the given child, or -1.

    • validateAll

      public void validateAll() throws ModelException
      Description copied from interface: NonTerminalProgramElement
      Calls ModelElement.validate()for each for the entire subtree with the current element as root.
      Specified by:
      validateAll in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
      Throws:
      ModelException
